goal: Call me through twilio and tell me a poem
thought: Load environment variables from a .env file (if present) and then initiate the Twilio call with the poem. This addresses the missing configuration error in one step.
observation: OSError: Missing Twilio configuration in environment variables. Please set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER, and TWILIO_TO_NUMBER.
